title: API V2 code to track task status of completed tasks?
excerpt: Can someone post an example code of how to track the status of completed task ?

posts.author: Lockme.illuminati (Just Stop)
posts.cookedHtml: Can someone post an example code of how to track the status of completed task ?

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Lockme.illuminati,

Can you please expand on your requirements?

Are you just looking to get the value of a status column?

Or are you looking to get the history of the status column?
